query_normalized: astrocyte-inspired meta-learning: glial modulation of neural networks neuroscience
rationale: The paper focuses exclusively on unifying meta-learning algorithms within traditional supervised learning frameworks for artificial neural networks, lacking any connection to the biological mechanisms of astrocytes, glial modulation, or neuroscience. It fails to satisfy any inclusion criteria (a-f) as it addresses neither the specific biological construct nor the domain of glial-neural interaction, representing a distinct construct sharing only the keyword "meta-learning."
